Goals-6dof.name: RigidBody
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 六自由度刚体约束，模拟刚体物理行为，包含位置和旋转约束
Goals-6dof.desc_en: Rigid body constraint with 6 degrees of freedom, controls position and rotation

Goals-6dof.name: RigidPlane
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 刚体平面约束，限制物体在平面上运动
Goals-6dof.desc_en: Rigid plane constraint, limits movement to a plane

Goals-6dof.name: Hinge
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 铰链旋转约束，模拟门轴效果，绕单轴旋转
Goals-6dof.desc_en: Hinge rotation constraint, rotates around a single axis

Goals-6dof.name: Motor
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 施加旋转力，驱动物体旋转，可控制速度和扭矩
Goals-6dof.desc_en: Apply motor torque, controls rotation speed and torque

Goals-6dof.name: UnaryForce
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 施加单向力，推动物体沿指定方向运动
Goals-6dof.desc_en: Apply a single force, pushes object in specified direction

Goals-6dof.name: Torque
Goals-6dof.desc_cn: 施加扭矩，产生旋转效果

Goals-Angle.name: Angle
Goals-Angle.desc_cn: 控制两点之间的角度，保持指定夹角
Goals-Angle.desc_en: Control angle between points, maintain specified angle

Goals-Angle.name: EqualAngle
Goals-Angle.desc_cn: 角度相等约束，使多个角度保持相等
Goals-Angle.desc_en: Equal angle constraint, keeps multiple angles equal

Goals-Angle.name: Planarize
Goals-Angle.desc_cn: 平面化约束，将点约束到同一平面
Goals-Angle.desc_en: Planarize constraint, forces points onto same plane

Goals-Angle.name: DihedralAngle
Goals-Angle.desc_cn: 二面角约束，控制两个面的夹角
Goals-Angle.desc_en: Dihedral angle constraint, controls angle between two faces

Goals-Co.name: Coincident
Goals-Co.desc_cn: 点重合约束，使多个点重合在一起
Goals-Co.desc_en: Coincident constraint, makes multiple points coincide

Goals-Co.name: CoLinear
Goals-Co.desc_cn: 共线约束，使点保持在同一直线上
Goals-Co.desc_en: Colinear constraint, keeps points on same line

Goals-Co.name: CoPlanar
Goals-Co.desc_cn: 共面约束，使点保持在同一平面上
Goals-Co.desc_en: Coplanar constraint, keeps points on same plane

Goals-Co.name: EqualLength
Goals-Co.desc_cn: 线段等长约束，使多条线段长度相等
Goals-Co.desc_en: Equal length constraint, makes multiple segments equal length

Goals-Col.name: Collider
Goals-Col.desc_cn: 通用碰撞检测，防止物体穿透
Goals-Col.desc_en: General collision detection, prevents object penetration

Goals-Col.name: SphereCollide
Goals-Col.desc_cn: 球体碰撞检测，保持球体间不重叠
Goals-Col.desc_en: Sphere collision detection, keeps spheres non-overlapping

Goals-Col.name: MeshCollider
Goals-Col.desc_cn: 网格碰撞检测，与网格表面碰撞
Goals-Col.desc_en: Mesh collision detection, collides with mesh surface

Goals-Col.name: LineCollider
Goals-Col.desc_cn: 线碰撞检测，防止线条穿透
Goals-Col.desc_en: Line collision detection, prevents line penetration

Goals-Lin.name: Length
Goals-Lin.desc_cn: 长度约束，保持两点间固定距离
Goals-Lin.desc_en: Length constraint, maintains fixed distance between points

Goals-Lin.name: ClampLength
Goals-Lin.desc_cn: 限制长度约束，距离不超过最大值
Goals-Lin.desc_en: Clamp length constraint, distance not exceeding maximum

Goals-Lin.name: Spring
Goals-Lin.desc_cn: 弹簧约束，弹性力连接两点
Goals-Lin.desc_en: Spring constraint, elastic force between points

Goals-Lin.name: Rod
Goals-Lin.desc_cn: 刚性杆约束，保持固定距离且不可压缩
Goals-Lin.desc_en: Rigid rod constraint, fixed distance, incompressible

Goals-Mesh.name: SoapFilm
Goals-Mesh.desc_cn: 最小曲面约束，模拟肥皂膜效果
Goals-Mesh.desc_en: Minimal surface constraint, simulates soap film

Goals-Mesh.name: Pressure
Goals-Mesh.desc_cn: 施加压力，模拟内部压力

Goals-Mesh.name: Bending
Goals-Mesh.desc_cn: 弯曲约束，控制网格弯曲刚度
Goals-Mesh.desc_en: Bending constraint, controls mesh bending stiffness

Goals-Mesh.name: Smooth
Goals-Mesh.desc_cn: 平滑约束，使网格表面光滑
Goals-Mesh.desc_en: Smooth constraint, makes mesh surface smooth

Goals-Mesh.name: Laplace
Goals-Mesh.desc_cn: 拉普拉斯平滑约束，保持网格曲率
Goals-Mesh.desc_en: Laplace smoothing constraint, maintains mesh curvature

Goals-On.name: OnCurve
Goals-On.desc_cn: 点在线上约束，将点限制在曲线上
Goals-On.desc_en: Point on curve constraint, restricts point to curve

Goals-On.name: OnSurface
Goals-On.desc_cn: 点在面上约束，将点限制在曲面上
Goals-On.desc_en: Point on surface constraint, restricts point to surface

Goals-On.name: OnMesh
Goals-On.desc_cn: 点在网格上约束，将点限制在网格表面
Goals-On.desc_en: Point on mesh constraint, restricts point to mesh surface

Goals-On.name: OnPlane
Goals-On.desc_cn: 点在平面上约束，将点限制在平面
Goals-On.desc_en: Point on plane constraint, restricts point to plane

Goals-Pt.name: Anchor
Goals-Pt.desc_cn: 固定点约束，将点固定在指定位置
Goals-Pt.desc_en: Anchor point constraint, fixes point at specified position

Goals-Pt.name: Load
Goals-Pt.desc_cn: 施加载荷力，推动点运动

Goals-Pt.name: Gravity
Goals-Pt.desc_cn: 施加重力影响，模拟重力场

Goals-Pt.name: UnaryForce
Goals-Pt.desc_cn: 施加单点力，作用于单个点
Goals-Pt.desc_en: Unary force, applies force to single point

Main.name: KangarooSolver
Main.desc_cn: Kangaroo物理求解器主组件，控制模拟参数
Main.desc_en: Kangaroo physics solver, controls simulation parameters

Main.name: Reset
Main.desc_cn: 重置求解器状态，清除所有约束
Main.desc_en: Reset solver state, clears all constraints

Main.name: Step
Main.desc_cn: 单步执行求解，逐步模拟

Main.name: Toggle
Main.desc_cn: 开关求解器，控制模拟运行/停止

Mesh.name: MeshEdges
Mesh.desc_cn: 网格边分析，提取网格边界
Mesh.desc_en: Mesh edges analysis, extracts mesh boundaries

Mesh.name: MeshVertices
Mesh.desc_cn: 网格顶点分析，提取顶点位置
Mesh.desc_en: Mesh vertices analysis, extracts vertex positions

Mesh.name: MeshTopology
Mesh.desc_cn: 网格拓扑分析，分析网格连接关系
Mesh.desc_en: Mesh topology analysis, analyzes mesh connectivity

Mesh.name: MeshNormals
Mesh.desc_cn: 网格法线分析，计算法线方向
Mesh.desc_en: Mesh normals analysis, calculates normal directions

Utility.name: Show
Utility.desc_cn: 显示辅助组件，可视化物理效果

Utility.name: Timer
Utility.desc_cn: 计时器组件，控制模拟时间

Utility.name: Recorder
Utility.desc_cn: 记录数据，保存模拟结果

Utility.name: Profiler
Utility.desc_cn: 性能分析，监测模拟效率
